title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 137.325 - Sections 137.325 to 137.420 applicable to first class counties
text:
137.325.  Sections 137.325 to 137.420 applicable to first class counties. — The provisions of sections 137.325 to 137.420 shall apply only to counties within the first class as provided by law.
(L. 1945 p. 1930 § 1)
